prompt: How have your lifts changed during your cut, and what helped you maintain strength while losing weight?
assertions: Acknowledges getting weaker during the cut
Attributes much of the strength loss to disrupted training (injury) rather than fat loss alone
Mentions a specific injury (wrist/elbow) that limited training
Notes that strength rebounded quickly once consistent lifting resumed
Frames consistency and acceptance as more important than chasing perfect in-cut numbers
